programmes.show_description: Adult siblings are accused of assaulting their father's new fiancée after she allegedly made prank calls to their mother. S10, Ep60
A club owner testifies that a very intoxicated woman and her fiancé were physically removed from his club, but denies charges of assault. S10, Ep61
A young woman plans a cruise with her mother only to have the trip cancelled; she is accused of pocketing the refund and going on a cruise with her aunt. S23, Ep25
A woman can't keep up with costs to care for her beloved 20K show jumper; when the horse goes lame, she can't afford to keep him alive. S23, Ep26
A woman brings to court her surviving dog and the ashes of a toy Yorkie that did not survive an alleged attack by her neighbour's Pit Bull. S23, Ep27
A respected family friend helps fund a young girl's 15th birthday party but always expected to be paid back. S23, Ep28
An allegedly irate passenger claims reckless driving threw him and his wife to the floor of a limo; he takes action. S23, Ep30
A young woman claims an untrained Husky puppy made her home uninhabitable and that the dog was allegedly abused by her roommate. S23, Ep31
A woman accuses the ex-lover of her current boyfriend of ramming her car numerous times, kicking it and then harassing her. S23, Ep32
When a tenant delivers a note to her landlord, she is accused of breaking and entering. A student claims that a large puppet injured him. S10, Ep56
Family drama escalates when cousins get violent over the use of a shared parking space. A woman sues the father of her child for kicking her car. S10, Ep57
Using clever investigative techniques, police uncover a series of bizarre events surrounding the death of a woman that was shot in the back. S7, Ep9
Investigators use a decapitated body and an artificial hip to track down the leader of the American Atheists group, who mysteriously disappeared. S7, Ep10
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Police divers training in Loch Lomond, Scotland, discover human body parts. Detectives face a battle to put the killer behind bars as the prime suspect flees. S1, Ep1
A murdered US woman is found in a duffle-bag washed up on the Florida coast. Her married, military lover is the prime suspect - and a single gold earring seals his fate. S1, Ep2
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
After Angela Craig died, her autopsy revealed she had been poisoned and police claimed the evidence pointed to her husband. S36, Ep23
The bodies of a woman and her son are found in a field. Insects found on the bodies and a suspicious blond hair help to track down the killer. S5, Ep3
A murder victim's final moments are caught on tape. The crime scene looks like a robbery-murder. Evidence points to a jilted ex, but will his alibi check out? S16, Ep3
The body of a man is found thirty years after he was murdered. Scientists try to decipher his blank address book, whose contents have faded with age. S5, Ep4
A woman sets out on her bike and never returns. Her body is found a few miles from her house, with a gunshot wound to the head. S16, Ep4
A body is found floating at a dock in a North Florida creek. US Police initially suspect a motive of robbery, but the victim's complex love life suggests otherwise. S1, Ep3
A drought at a French lake reveals a sunken Toyota holding the body of a UK expat who's been missing for two years. Her controlling husband becomes police's prime suspect. S1, Ep4
In 2001, a California mother and wife, Jane Dorotik, was convicted of murdering her husband but always maintained her innocence. S36, Ep24
A teenage girl uses her own knowledge of forensics to help police track down her abductor. S7, Ep13
Investigators have the gruesome task of identifying the owner of a severed leg found in a rubbish bin. S7, Ep14
Top-notch forensic science helps solve crimes. A post-mortem on a badly burned body reveals he was stabbed 24 times. Police suspect that more than one criminal might be responsible. S7, Ep15
In 1996, a sexual attacker was tracked down and detained, but years later, new forensic science sheds new light on the case. S7, Ep16
A woman breaks down after hearing the Judge's verdict in regards to her beloved dog that she shared with her boyfriend. S23, Ep33
A veteran tree-trimmer is accused of felling a tree and damaging his client's porch. S23, Ep34
A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for the theft of a Corvette and for leaving his two large dogs with her when he walked out. S23, Ep35
The police are called when a man allegedly kicks his landlord's dresser; the tenant says his landlord is a professional harasser and liar. S23, Ep36
A woman says she can't sleep at night after being blindsided and attacked by a large dog on a friend's property. S23, Ep37
Fascinating details about the flight of homing doves are revealed in this fight between two women over the alleged theft of 11 birds. S23, Ep38
A woman sells her home for three times what she paid for it and then sues a previous tenant for repairs; she claims over 55K in damages. S23, Ep39
A mechanic accuses his mother-in-law of burning his clothes after a domestic dispute concerning his son. A social worker sues her daughter. S10, Ep62
A teenager refutes charges that he jumped on a car in an angry rage and proceeded to assault a young man and his girlfriend. S10, Ep64
A teenager sues his date for expenses after being stood up on the day of his prom. She denies faking an illness because she was interested in another boy. S10, Ep63
Punchy reality show. A teenager accuses his ex-girlfriend of being an unfit mother, she claims he beat her up and abused her children. S10, Ep65
A minister-in-training sues his ex-lover for malicious prosecution. She claims he is a con artist and owes her thousands. S10, Ep66
Punchy reality show about a female judge who has made a real impact on the American justice system. Judge Judy is real, honest and keen to get to the bottom of emotional cases. S10, Ep67

When a policeman's home is burned to the ground, he later arrests a man who confesses to the arson. But the confession is dubious. S5, Ep5
The murder of a teacher's aide leaves a big hole in her small community. A scientific breakthrough leads to a shocking end to a tragic case. S16, Ep5
When a pregnant woman was attacked, her unborn child was killed. She accused her husband, who spent years in jail until new DNA evidence emerged. S5, Ep6
A building manager finds the lifeless body of a woman in her apartment. The case goes cold, then a new forensic tool examines the old evidence. S16, Ep6
A US woman allegedly drowns in the bathtub, but her husband's story doesn't add up. When his second wife also drowns two years on, police's worst fears are confirmed. S1, Ep5
In the US, a missing woman's body is found washed up on the shore of a tidal estuary. CCTV, DNA and a cryptic note lead investigators to her ex-partner. S1, Ep6
In May of 2019, Jennifer Farber Dulos dropped off her five children at school, drove to her Connecticut home, and was never seen again. S36, Ep25
Find out how man's best friend helped police track down the killer of a helpless couple. S7, Ep17
A woman falls into a fairytale romance, becomes pregnant and then gets terribly ill. Doctors assure her she's fine, but she's not so certain. S7, Ep18
Faryion Wardrip was a typical, honest citizen on the outside, but a brutal serial killer on the inside. DNA testing proved to be his demise. S7, Ep19
Top-notch forensic science helps solve crimes. A car found on the road appears to have been abandoned suddenly. Later, the body of the driver is found... S7, Ep20
A woman sends thousands to a man she has never met in person; she claims he is trapped in Afghanistan and the US military won't help him get home. S23, Ep40
When a vacation falls apart after an argument, a woman is accused of breaking into her ex-friend's garage to retrieve her van. S23, Ep41
A man denies repeatedly slamming his sister's arm in a screen door; he says he was just trying to get her out of his home after a heated argument. S23, Ep42
When motorists collide at high speed, both drivers are injured and blame each other for the accident. S23, Ep43
A complete stranger allegedly keys a six-foot scratch on the side of a woman's car with a Clinton bumper sticker. S23, Ep44
A man accuses his ex-lover of fraudulently registering his car under her name; she said he gave the car to her. S23, Ep45
When a stylist gets to work she discovers that the electricity has been turned off and later claims that all of her property was stolen; she blames her landlord. S23, Ep46
